title: CNBC Daily Open: Middle East conflict stokes energy supply worries
summary_full: U.S. crude oil hit as much as $80 per barrel Thursday, as the escalating Iran war enters its seventh day and continues disrupting global fuel supplies.
summary_public: U.S. crude oil hit as much as $80 per barrel Thursday, as the escalating Iran war enters its seventh day and continues disrupting global fuel supplies.

IR.label: negative
